nodes.label: Dev Database Port Override
nodes.rationale: Exposes PostgreSQL port 5432 only in the local override file so the database is reachable from the host during development without exposing it in the base composition.

nodes.label: Mailpit Dev Mailer Service
nodes.rationale: Provisioned by the symfony/mailer recipe: axllent/mailpit catches outgoing mail locally (SMTP 1025, UI 8025) and accepts any/insecure auth for development convenience.

nodes.label: PostgreSQL Database Service
nodes.rationale: Provisioned by the doctrine/doctrine-bundle Flex recipe. Uses postgres:16-alpine with a pg_isready healthcheck so dependents wait for readiness; data persists in a named volume, with a commented bind-mount alternative suggested to make accidental data loss harder.

nodes.label: AssetMapper Configuration
nodes.rationale: Maps the assets/ directory; missing_import_mode is strict in dev to surface broken imports early but relaxed to warn in prod to avoid hard failures at runtime.

nodes.label: Framework Cache Configuration
nodes.rationale: The app cache stores to the filesystem by default and should persist between deploys; Redis and APCu adapters are documented alternatives, with APCu discouraged under heavy random-write workloads due to memory fragmentation.

nodes.label: Stateless CSRF Protection
nodes.rationale: Stateless CSRF token ids (submit, authenticate, logout) protect forms, logins, and logouts without requiring server-side session storage for tokens.

nodes.label: VarDumper Server Forwarding
nodes.rationale: In dev, VarDumper data clones are forwarded to a centralized dump server (tcp://VAR_DUMPER_SERVER, started via server:dump) so dumps can be inspected on the CLI or in the browser instead of polluting responses.

nodes.label: Doctrine DBAL Connection
nodes.rationale: Connection resolved from the DATABASE_URL env var; profiling backtraces are collected only when kernel.debug is on. In the test environment a dbname_suffix (_test plus TEST_TOKEN) isolates per-process databases for ParaTest.

nodes.label: Doctrine ORM Mapping
nodes.rationale: Entities in src/Entity are mapped via PHP attributes under the App\Entity prefix with the underscore naming strategy; identity generation is preferred on PostgreSQLPlatform, matching the Postgres database service.

nodes.label: Prod Doctrine Cache Pools
nodes.rationale: In prod, ORM query and result caches are routed to dedicated pools (doctrine.system_cache_pool on cache.system, doctrine.result_cache_pool on cache.app) to improve performance without affecting dev/test behavior.

nodes.label: Doctrine Migrations Configuration
nodes.rationale: Migrations live in the project migrations/ directory under the DoctrineMigrations namespace, deliberately different from App\Migrations so migration classes are never autoloaded; the migrations profiler is disabled.

nodes.label: Session Configuration (lazy start, mock storage in test)
nodes.norm_label: session configuration (lazy start, mock storage in test)

nodes.label: Messenger Message Routing (SendEmailMessage, ChatMessage, SmsMessage to async)
nodes.norm_label: messenger message routing (sendemailmessage, chatmessage, smsmessage to async)

nodes.label: Notifier Channel Policy (all urgency levels routed to email)
nodes.norm_label: notifier channel policy (all urgency levels routed to email)

nodes.norm_label: router default uri (default_uri for non-http url generation)

nodes.label: Password Hashers (auto, reduced cost in test)
nodes.norm_label: password hashers (auto, reduced cost in test)

nodes.label: Twig Configuration (*.twig pattern, strict_variables in test)
nodes.norm_label: twig configuration (*.twig pattern, strict_variables in test)

nodes.label: Stateless CSRF Protection (check_header, for Turbo forms/logins)
nodes.norm_label: stateless csrf protection (check_header, for turbo forms/logins)

nodes.label: Validator Configuration (auto-mapping hint, not_compromised_password off in test)
nodes.norm_label: validator configuration (auto-mapping hint, not_compromised_password off in test)

nodes.label: Web Profiler (toolbar in dev, collect disabled in test)
nodes.norm_label: web profiler (toolbar in dev, collect disabled in test)

nodes.label: Attribute Controller Route Import
nodes.rationale: Entry point of app routing: methods carrying the #[Route] attribute are auto-imported via the routing.controllers resource, so no per-route YAML is needed.

nodes.label: Dev Error Pages Routes
nodes.rationale: Loads FrameworkBundle error-page preview routes under /_error only in the dev environment.

nodes.label: Security Logout Route Loader
nodes.rationale: Logout routes are provided by the security.route_loader.logout service (type: service) rather than declared statically.

nodes.label: App Namespace Autowiring
nodes.rationale: All classes under src/ are registered as services keyed by FQCN with autowire and autoconfigure enabled, minimizing explicit service configuration; later definitions replace earlier ones when explicit config is needed.

nodes.label: Task 10 Report: E2E browser validation 10/10 + PR #3 + final fix wave
nodes.rationale: Final fix wave: print-color-adjust exact added under @media print because .fr-verdict and the 1AK chip render white text on colored backgrounds that browsers drop when printing; loadHistory gained an Array.isArray guard and openSim/dupSim an entry.sim guard because the fr2026_sims localStorage key is shared with a legacy mock whose foreign shapes must not crash the component.
nodes.norm_label: task 10 report: e2e browser validation 10/10 + pr #3 + final fix wave

nodes.label: Pure fiscal engine (no DOM, no Alpine)
nodes.rationale: engine.js is kept a pure module (no DOM, no Alpine) so the fiscal rules ported from the validated spec are unit-testable with node --test, runnable in CI without a browser, and consumable unchanged by the Alpine component; display formatting is delegated to eur()/eur2().
nodes.norm_label: pure fiscal engine (no dom, no alpine)

nodes.label: Decision: net stays unrounded per spec, tolerance in tests
nodes.rationale: The implementer's Math.round() on net (added to fix an IEEE 754 assertion failure) violated the spec rule 'Total net : max(0, total - allocationTeletravail)' with no rounding — display rounding belongs to eur(). Controller adjudication reversed the deviation: the engine stays spec-faithful and the test assertion got a 1e-9 tolerance instead.
nodes.norm_label: decision: net stays unrounded per spec, tolerance in tests

nodes.label: Deep persistence via Alpine.effect + JSON.stringify
nodes.rationale: Alpine.effect wraps JSON.stringify(this.sim) because stringify touches every nested key, so the effect re-runs on any sim mutation (x-model writes included) and syncHist persists the snapshot to localStorage without wiring per-field watchers.

nodes.label: localStorage key fr2026_sims (legacy-mock compatible)
nodes.rationale: The key fr2026_sims is kept from the original mock for data compatibility; openSim carries soft migrations for older data shapes, and the task-10 fix wave added Array.isArray/entry.sim guards because foreign shapes written by the legacy mock can share the key.

nodes.label: Regle materiel: deduction one-shot <= 500 EUR, amortissement 3 ans au-dela
nodes.norm_label: regle materiel: deduction one-shot <= 500 eur, amortissement 3 ans au-dela

nodes.label: Prorata teletravail (jTT/7) pour charges du domicile et loyer
nodes.norm_label: prorata teletravail (jtt/7) pour charges du domicile et loyer

nodes.label: Verdict: frais reels nets vs abattement forfaitaire 10%
nodes.rationale: The whole simulator exists to answer one question: do net real expenses exceed the automatic 10% allowance (clamped to Y.min/Y.max)? The verdict getter yields win/lose/na states and the winning amount is reported in box 1AK.
nodes.norm_label: verdict: frais reels nets vs abattement forfaitaire 10%

nodes.label: Scenario E2E de reference (decl 2026: total 3362, abattement 3500)
nodes.rationale: A single canonical scenario (salaire 35000, repas 12,50, voiture 5CV 12 km, PC 899 amorti 70%, box 39,99 a 29%) is pinned both as an engine unit test and as the task-10 browser walkthrough, so any template/component binding drift from the engine values is detectable.
nodes.norm_label: scenario e2e de reference (decl 2026: total 3362, abattement 3500)

nodes.label: Simulateur de frais reels (feature, route /)
nodes.rationale: Premiere fonctionnalite, 100 % cote client : moteur fiscal assets/js/engine.js, composant Alpine assets/app.js, partials templates/simulateur/. Les simulations vivent en localStorage, la BDD reste dormante.

nodes.label: CI GitHub Actions ci.yml (php-lint, php-tests, js-checks)
nodes.rationale: La CI appelle exactement les scripts composer/npm locaux pour ne pas maintenir de commandes divergentes ; en CI tout est check-only, l'autofix est reserve au local.
nodes.norm_label: ci github actions ci.yml (php-lint, php-tests, js-checks)

nodes.label: Gotcha : port PostgreSQL aleatoire
nodes.rationale: compose.override.yaml publie le port 5432 du conteneur sur un port hote aleatoire alors que DATABASE_URL dans .env suppose 127.0.0.1:5432 ; recuperer le port reel via docker compose port database 5432 et surcharger DATABASE_URL dans .env.local (gitignore).

nodes.label: Piege Kernel::getAllowedEnvs (@phpstan-ignore method.unused)
nodes.rationale: Ce n'est PAS du code mort : hook framework qui restreint les valeurs d'APP_ENV, appele par KernelTrait dans vendor et invisible pour PHPStan. Deja supprime par erreur une fois pour satisfaire PHPStan - la suppression desactive silencieusement l'enforcement.

nodes.label: Cohabitation Alpine.js / Stimulus
nodes.rationale: Stimulus reste le mecanisme de controleurs auto-enregistres ; Alpine est utilise localement (composant du simulateur) pour de la reactivite fine sans creer de controleur Stimulus dedie.

nodes.label: AssetMapper + importmap (pas de bundler ni build front)
nodes.rationale: Les dependances JS sont vendorees dans assets/vendor/ (gitignore), aucun bundler ni etape de build ; le toolchain Node sert uniquement au lint et aux tests du moteur fiscal.
nodes.norm_label: assetmapper + importmap (pas de bundler ni build front)

nodes.label: Messenger : transport async Doctrine
nodes.rationale: SendEmailMessage, ChatMessage et SmsMessage sont routes vers async : rien ne part sans un worker messenger:consume actif. Echecs vers le transport failed, 3 retries avec multiplicateur 2.

nodes.label: PHPUnit 13 en mode strict
nodes.rationale: failOnDeprecation, failOnNotice et failOnWarning actifs : une deprecation fait echouer la suite.

nodes.label: Protection CSRF stateless (jeton par header, Turbo actif)
nodes.norm_label: protection csrf stateless (jeton par header, turbo actif)

nodes.label: Spec : mise en place de la CI qualite
nodes.norm_label: spec : mise en place de la ci qualite

nodes.label: Workflow ci.yml : 3 jobs paralleles (php-lint, php-tests, js-lint)
nodes.rationale: Declencheurs pull_request et push master, concurrency avec annulation des runs obsoletes ; en CI tous les linters sont en mode check-only, jamais d'autofix.
nodes.norm_label: workflow ci.yml : 3 jobs paralleles (php-lint, php-tests, js-lint)

nodes.label: Choix des outils qualite PHP
nodes.rationale: php-cs-fixer + twig-cs-fixer + PHPStan retenus ; phpcs ecarte car redondant avec php-cs-fixer ; twigcs ecarte car non maintenu, remplace par twig-cs-fixer. Pas de base de donnees en CI pour l'instant (le service Postgres viendra avec les premiers tests fonctionnels).

nodes.label: Parite locale / CI des verifications
nodes.rationale: DX locale : scripts composer et npm definis une fois ; la CI appelle exactement ces scripts, garantissant que ce qui passe en local passe en CI.

nodes.label: Smoke test tests/SmokeTest.php (boot du Kernel)
nodes.rationale: La suite PHPUnit etant vide, le smoke test (KernelTestCase, boot du kernel) garantit que le job de tests valide reellement quelque chose et que le comportement de PHPUnit sur suite vide ne bloque pas la CI par surprise.

nodes.label: Prettier volontairement scope a assets/
nodes.rationale: Scope a assets/ (et non .) pour ne pas entrer en conflit avec les fichiers YAML/JSON generes et regeneres par Symfony Flex (composer.json, config/*.yaml).

nodes.label: PHPStan niveau 8 des le depart
nodes.rationale: Indolore sur un src/ quasi vide, evite une montee de niveau douloureuse plus tard.

nodes.label: Spec : simulateur de frais reels (Alpine + Bootstrap 5.3)
nodes.norm_label: spec : simulateur de frais reels (alpine + bootstrap 5.3)

nodes.label: Decision client-only, parite maquette
nodes.rationale: Moteur de calcul en JS, simulations en localStorage : aucun backend metier, pas de compte, la BDD reste dormante. Parite fonctionnelle avec la maquette HTML validee.

nodes.label: Moteur fiscal pur (assets/js/engine.js)
nodes.rationale: Aucune dependance DOM/Alpine pour rester testable avec node --test (zero dependance) : le moteur est le coeur du risque, couvert par des tests unitaires (repas, km, materiel, loyer, abattement, verdict, parsing).

nodes.label: Wizard 6 etapes (Profil, Repas, Trajets, Materiel, Abonnements, Synthese)
nodes.rationale: Stepper cliquable a etapes librement accessibles, navigation Precedent/Continuer, un partial Twig par ecran.
nodes.norm_label: wizard 6 etapes (profil, repas, trajets, materiel, abonnements, synthese)

nodes.label: Bareme kilometrique DGFiP (3 tranches par vehicule, +20 % electrique)
nodes.norm_label: bareme kilometrique dgfip (3 tranches par vehicule, +20 % electrique)

nodes.label: Baremes par annee de declaration 2024-2026 (foyer, plafond, min/max)
nodes.source_location: section Moteur fiscal / Configuration par annee
nodes.norm_label: baremes par annee de declaration 2024-2026 (foyer, plafond, min/max)

nodes.label: Regle materiel : bascule 500 EUR / amortissement 3 ans
nodes.source_location: sections Perimetre (etape 4) et Regles de calcul
nodes.rationale: Correction vs maquette : l'annee d'achat par defaut d'une nouvelle ligne est l'annee de revenus de la declaration choisie - la maquette codait 2025 en dur, invalide pour une declaration 2024.
nodes.norm_label: regle materiel : bascule 500 eur / amortissement 3 ans

nodes.label: Abattement 10 % (clamp min/max) et verdict 3 etats
nodes.rationale: Verdict : abattement 0 -> renseigner le salaire ; net > abattement -> frais reels gagnants (gain affiche, mention allocation) ; sinon rester a l'abattement (perte affichee).

nodes.label: Persistence localStorage cle fr2026_sims
nodes.source_location: sections Architecture et Structure d'une simulation
nodes.rationale: Cle conservee de la maquette pour compatibilite des donnees existantes ; historique = tableau d'entrees {id, name, updated, total, sim} avec migration douce a l'ouverture (champs manquants completes).

nodes.label: Retrait YAGNI : selecteur de palette et toggle pedagogie
nodes.rationale: Props d'editeur de la maquette, pas des fonctionnalites utilisateur : palette vert sauge fixe, encarts pedagogiques toujours affiches.
nodes.norm_label: retrait yagni : selecteur de palette et toggle pedagogie

nodes.label: Cohabitation Alpine + Stimulus actee (importmap, pas de CDN)
nodes.rationale: alpinejs et bootstrap ajoutes via importmap (vendores par AssetMapper, pas de CDN) ; Stimulus/Turbo et leurs controleurs recette restent en place, inchanges. Exception actee : Google Fonts via <link>.
nodes.norm_label: cohabitation alpine + stimulus actee (importmap, pas de cdn)

nodes.label: Simulateur Frais Reels Implementation Plan (10 tasks)
nodes.norm_label: simulateur frais reels implementation plan (10 tasks)

nodes.label: Pattern deep-persist via Alpine.effect
nodes.rationale: JSON.stringify touche chaque cle imbriquee du sim : l'effet Alpine se re-execute sur toute mutation (ecritures x-model incluses) et synchronise l'historique localStorage via syncHist/saveHistory.

nodes.label: Migration douce a l'ouverture d'une simulation (openSim)
nodes.rationale: openSim complete les champs manquants (repas.mois, annee, km) des entrees sauvees par d'anciennes versions du format de donnees, comme dans la maquette.
nodes.norm_label: migration douce a l'ouverture d'une simulation (opensim)

nodes.label: Scenario E2E de reference (declaration 2026)
nodes.rationale: Les valeurs (repas 951,75 ; km 2061 ; total 3362 ; abattement 3500) sont garanties par engine.test.js : un ecart constate au navigateur vient du binding template/composant, pas du moteur.
